RECOVERY_OUT_OF_BOUNDS_WARNING: You are leaving the mission area.
RECOVERY_PRESIDENT_DEAD: You let the President get killed.
RECOVERY_PROMPT_MUTE_DEVICE: Hold ^3 &&1 ^7 to Plant the Mute Charge
RECOVERY_PROMPT_MUTE_DEVICE_PC: Press ^3 &&1 ^7 to Plant the Mute Charge
RECOVERY_PROMPT_STIM: Press ^3[{+actionslot 4}]^7 to Use Stim when Wounded
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_CONTACT: Hold ^3[{+frag}]^7 and Press ^3[{+reload}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_EMP: Hold ^3[{+smoke}]^7 and Press ^3[{+reload}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_PC_EMP: Hold ^3[{+smoke}]^7 and Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_PC_SMART: Hold ^3[{+frag}]^7 and Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_PC_THREAT: Hold ^3[{+smoke}]^7 and Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_SMART: Hold ^3[{+frag}]^7 and Press ^3[{+reload}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
RECOVERY_PROMPT_TUTORIAL_THREAT: Hold ^3[{+smoke}]^7 and Press ^3[{+reload}]^7 to Cycle Grenades
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_AT11_KILLEDEVERYHO: ^2Atlas Guard 1: ^7Killed every hostage. Just lined them up and shot em. They were never going to negotiate.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_AT11_THEYSAIDITWAS: ^2Atlas Guard 1: ^7They said it was a KVA attack.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_AT2_THOSEFUCKERSGE: ^2Atlas Guard 2: ^7Those fuckers get bolder by the day.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_AT3_NEARLYBROKEHIS: ^2Atlas Guard 3: ^7Nearly broke his neck using that boost jump rig.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_AT4_JUSTTAKESSKILL: ^2Atlas Guard 4: ^7Just takes skill, man. Doesn't look that hard.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_CRK_HELEAVESBEHIND: ^2Cormack: ^7He leaves behind family, friends, fellow Marines, and a grateful nation.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_CRK_IMSORRYMITCHEL: ^2Cormack: ^7I'm sorry, Mitchell. Will was one of our best. Look, we take care of our own. If you ever need anything...
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_CRK_IMSORRYMR: ^2Cormack: ^7I'm sorry Mr. Irons, but Mitchell's been discharged. With his injuries--
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_CRK_MR: ^2Cormack: ^7Mr. Irons, I'm sorry for your loss, sir.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_CRK_MRIRONSMITCHEL: ^2Cormack: ^7Mr. Irons, Mitchell's been discharged. With his injuries--
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_ALRIGHTGRABSOM: ^2Gideon: ^7Alright, grab some grenades and run the training course.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_ALRIGHTPICKYOU: ^2Gideon: ^7Alright, pick your entry point. We'll RV at the media room.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_ASSAULTISEQUIP: ^2Gideon: ^7Assault is equipped with boost jump, as well as sonics for crowd control.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_COPY: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy. Mitchell and I will be there in a minute.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_EQUIPMENTFAILU: ^2Gideon: ^7No excuse for equipment failure. Best weapon you have is the one between your ears. Use it.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_FUCKMETHEYREPL: ^2Gideon: ^7Fuck me, they replace the wrong arm?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_GETTHEPRESIDEN: ^2Gideon: ^7Get the president inside! Do it right this time!
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_GETYOURDRONEIN: ^2Gideon: ^7Get your drone in the air, Mitchell!
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_GOOD2: ^2Gideon: ^7Good. Run it again for a real challenge.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_HEH: ^2Gideon: ^7Heh. He's got the mark three exo. Poor bastards don't stand a chance.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_HEH3: ^2Gideon: ^7Heh. He's got the assault exo. Poor bastards don't stand a chance.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_HEREAGAINILONA: ^2Gideon: ^7Here again, Ilona? Trying to prove something?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_IRONSHASTAKENA: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons has taken a shine to you. Don't let it go to your head.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_ITLLBEACHALLEN: ^2Gideon: ^7It'll be a challenge with just a pistol.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_ITSHISARMSIR: ^2Gideon: ^7It's his arm, sir. I knew it was too early--
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_JOKERWEREBRING: ^2Gideon: ^7Joker, we're bringing Mitchell over to R&D. Get the sim prepped for another run.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_JOKERWEREHEADI: ^2Gideon: ^7Joker, we're heading up. Switching the sim to assault mode this time.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_LETSMOVE: ^2Gideon: ^7Let's move. We're gonna run the simulator again.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_MR: ^2Gideon: ^7Mr. President, we're here to rescue you. Need your authentication code.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_NOEXCUSEFOREQU: ^2Gideon: ^7No excuse for equipment failure. Best weapon you have is the one between your ears. Use it.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_OVERTOTHEGRENA: ^2Gideon: ^7Over to the grenade range. You need some hands on with the variable grenades.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_PROPHETWEREAPP: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, we're approaching the north access road. Need immediate exfil!
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_SHOOTTHROUGHWA: ^2Gideon: ^7Shoot through walls to hit those targets.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_STAYSHARPIRONS: ^2Gideon: ^7Stay sharp, Irons is going to be watching. I'm leading this time.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_STEPUPTOTHESTA: ^2Gideon: ^7Step up to the station when you're ready.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_SWITCHTOEMPSTO: ^2Gideon: ^7Switch to EMPs to take out drones.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_TECHNICIANSARE: ^2Gideon: ^7Technicians are waiting for you. Get that thing fixed up and meet me out here.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_THEOVERDRIVEBA: ^2Gideon: ^7The Overdrive battery burns up quick, so use it sparingly.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_THESPECIALISTE: ^2Gideon: ^7The Specialist exo you're wearing has a built-in shield, in addition to overdrive capability.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_TOSSASMARTGREN: ^2Gideon: ^7Toss a smart grenade and aim at a target to guide it.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_VARIABLEGRENAD: ^2Gideon: ^7Variable grenades let you switch your grenade type on the fly, depending on the threat.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_WEVEDEVELOPEDT: ^2Gideon: ^7We've developed two types of exos: assault and specialist. Each has as primary and secondary ability.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_GDN_YOUREXOISEQUIP: ^2Gideon: ^7Your exo is equipped with Overdrive. Use it if you need a tactical advantage.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_ILN1_DONTNEEDTOTRY: ^2Ilona: ^7Don't need to try. Still got first place.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_ILN1_SHIT: ^2Ilona: ^7Shit. Where did this guy come from?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_DONTLETWILLSDE: ^2Irons: ^7Don't let Will's death be in vain.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_EXCUSEMEPRIVAT: ^2Irons: ^7Excuse me, Private Mitchell? I'm Jonathan Irons. I'm Will's father.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_HESREADYFORREA: ^2Irons: ^7He's ready for real work. Good job, son. Welcome to Atlas.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_IKNOWALLABOUTM: ^2Irons: ^7I know all about Mitchell's injuries, Sergeant. At Atlas, we have prosthetics twenty years beyond anything the military could offer you.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_IKNOWYOURENOTI: ^2Irons: ^7I know you're not in this for the money, Mitchell—you remind me a lot of Will in that way.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_IMAWAREOFHISIN: ^2Irons: ^7I'm aware of his injuries, Sergeant. At Atlas, we have prosthetics that are twenty years beyond anything the military could offer you.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_IMSUREYOUARESE: ^2Irons: ^7I'm sure you are, Sergeant. Private Mitchell, you were Will's best friend. You both paid too high a price for your country.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_ITWASMORETHANU: ^2Irons: ^7It was more than unfortunate Sergeant, it was unnecessary. Son, I want to offer you a second chance.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_ITWASWORSETHAN: ^2Irons: ^7It was worse than unfortunate. It was unnecessary. Son, I'm offering you a second chance.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_JUMPIN: ^2Irons: ^7Jump in. Let me give you the tour.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_JUMPIN2: ^2Irons: ^7Jump in. I'll give you the tour.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_LOOKSLIKEWEHAV: ^2Irons: ^7Looks like we have an operator on our hands.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_MITCHELLIKNOWY: ^2Irons: ^7Mitchell, I know you're not in this for the money, you remind me a lot of Will in that way.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_POWERISNTJUSTA: ^2Irons: ^7Power isn't just about our ability to destroy. Atlas has built infrastructures in places like Korea, Sierra Leone, Nigeria. We do in a few years what it takes governments decades to accomplish.
^2Irons: ^7Power isn't just about the ability to destroy. Atlas has built infrastructures in places like Korea, Sierra Leone, Nigeria.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_THATARMSWORTHM: ^2Irons: ^7That arm's worth more to me than this whole facility. Now, how's my boy doing?
^2Irons: ^7That arm's worth more to me than this entire facility. How's my boy doing?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_THETRUTHISWEAR: ^2Irons: ^7In fact, the truth is, we are often more effective than the governments that hire us... as my son found out the hard way.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_UNLIKETHEGOVER: ^2Irons: ^7Unlike the government, we don't keep secrets of our capabilities. We don't sell policy. We sell power. We are a super-power for hire.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_WEDOINAFEW: ^2Irons: ^7We do in a few years what it takes governments decades to accomplish. In fact, the truth is, we're often more effective than the governments that hire us... as my son found out the hard way.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_WELLKEEPWORKIN: ^2Irons: ^7Well keep working. This is a great soldier. It's a sad day indeed when the military has no use for good men like you.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_WELLTHENKEEPWO: ^2Irons: ^7Well, then keep working. This is a great soldier. It's a sad day indeed when the military no longer has use for good men like you.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_WHATYOURESEEIN: ^2Irons: ^7What you're seeing is advanced warfare. Atlas has the single largest standing military in the world, but we answer to no country.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_IRS_WILLTOLDMEWHAT: ^2Irons: ^7Will told me what kind of soldier you were. You deserve to fight for a military that's as effective as you are.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_BOSSWEGOTTHESI: ^2Joker: ^7Boss, we got the sim ready to roll again.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_MR: ^2Joker: ^7Mr. President, we're an Atlas rescue force. Can you authenticate?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_OK2: ^2Joker: ^7Ok. Please keep your head down and stay close.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_OKAYEVERYONEKN: ^2Joker: ^7Okay, everyone knows what to do this time. Get into position.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_OKEVERYONEKNOW: ^2Joker: ^7Ok, everyone knows what to do. Move into position.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_PROPHETWEHAVET: ^2Joker: ^7Prophet, we have the package. Moving to extract.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_PROPHETWEREAPP: ^2Joker: ^7Prophet, we're approaching the north access road. What's our exfil status?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_THERESOURRIDE: ^2Joker: ^7There's our ride! Mitchell, get the President inside!
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_WELLDOTHISQUIE: ^2Joker: ^7We'll do this quiet. Get that mute charge ready.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_WEREGOINGTOHAV: ^2Joker: ^7We're going to have to dig in until our ride gets here.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_JKR_WHATTHEHELLSWR: ^2Joker: ^7What the hell's wrong with your arm?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PA_ATTENTIONATLAST: ^2PA: ^7Attention: Atlas team Alpha, report to training simulator three. I repeat, Atlas team Alpha to training simulator three.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PA_COMMENCINGTEST7: ^2PA: ^7Commencing test 772. Please stay clear of the test area.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PA_DR: ^2PA: ^7Dr. Chambers, please report to conference room C. Thank you.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PA_EXOMARK3DEMONST: ^2PA: ^7Exo Mark 3 demonstration beginning in 5 minutes in the Atrium.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PA_REMINDERSECURIT: ^2PA: ^7Reminder: security badges must be worn by visitors at all times. Thank you.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PA_RESETTINGSIMULA: ^2PA: ^7Resetting simulation. Everyone return to your starting positions.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PRT_ATLASZEROONEBE: ^2Prophet: ^7Atlas zero-one, be advised: we are detecting a large QRF approaching your position.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PRT_ATLASZEROONEWE: ^2Prophet: ^7Atlas zero-one, we are tracking POTUS. Media room, south wing.
^2Prophet: ^7Atlas zero-one, we are tracking POTUS. Media room, south wing.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PRT_COPYATLASZEROO: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy, Atlas zero-one. Egress to the north access road.
^2Prophet: ^7Copy, Atlas zero-one. Warbird inbound to provide air support, ETA one mike.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PRT_COPYTHATATLASZ: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy that, Atlas zero-one. Exfil on approach.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_PRT_TRANSPORTISCOM: ^2Prophet: ^7Transport is coming in hot. ETA 1 mike.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_RVS_HOSTILESONTHER: ^2Rivers: ^7Hostiles on the road, coming our way.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_RVS_IGOTDRONESONTH: ^2Rivers: ^7We're detecting drones on the back patio.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC1_STILLGETTINGAD: ^2Technician 1: ^7Still getting adhesion problems on inverted surfaces?
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC2_THENEWCOILSHAV: ^2Technician 2: ^7The new coils have cleared it up. Haven't dropped anyone yet.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC3_OKLETSGETREADY: ^2Technician 3: ^7Ok, let's get ready to run it again.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC4_ALRIGHTYOUREGO: ^2Technician: ^7Alright, you're good, but I recommend some trigger time to check the calibration.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC4_GOAHEADANDPLAC: ^2Technician: ^7Go ahead and place your arm on the table.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC4_HELLOMITCHELL: ^2Technician: ^7Hello Mitchell. Let's see what's going on with that arm.
SUBTITLE_RECOVERY_REC_TC4_TRYANDMOVEYOUR: ^2Technician: ^7Try and move your arm for me, please.
